subject: English
chapter: The Summer of the Beautiful White Horse

remember: Students will be able to recall the plot, characters, and setting of the story 'The Summer of the Beautiful White Horse'.
Students will be able to remember the key events and turning points in the story.
Students will be able to identify and list the themes and motifs present in the story.
understand: Students will be able to explain the author's purpose and intentions behind writing the story.
Students will be able to analyze the role of the narrator in shaping the reader's perception of the story.
Students will be able to comprehend the symbolism used in the story and its significance.
apply: Students will be able to apply the literary devices used in the story to their own writing.
Students will be able to use the story as a reference to analyze other literary texts.
Students will be able to create a character analysis of the protagonist and supporting characters.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the contrast between the beautiful white horse and the protagonist's reality.
Students will be able to evaluate the theme of illusion vs. reality in the story.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the story with other literary texts on similar themes.

ncert_objectives: To understand the plot, characters, and setting of the story 'The Summer of the Beautiful White Horse'.
To analyze the themes and motifs present in the story.
To evaluate the role of the author's narrative style in shaping the reader's perception of the story.
board_exam_objectives: To recall the plot and key events of the story.
To identify and explain the themes and motifs present in the story.
To analyze the character of the protagonist and supporting characters.
